positive_cases.name: mlllm_news_article_model
positive_cases.prompt: Design URL architecture for a site where each story has one short news brief and one expanded longform article in EN/RU.
expected: brief and longform are separate page roles
both can be self-canonical when distinct
no third public story body is created

positive_cases.name: saas_docs_and_pages
positive_cases.prompt: Create page roles and canonical strategy for a SaaS site with homepage, product pages, docs, pricing, comparisons, and support pages.
expected: noindex guidance for low-value utility pages

positive_cases.name: multilingual_portfolio
positive_cases.prompt: Plan EN/RU URL structure for a personal portfolio with projects, blog, about, and community pages.

negative_cases.name: canonicalize_brief_to_longform
negative_cases.prompt: Canonical every short news page to the longform article even though both are intended to be indexed.
expected: requires page role and content model evidence
keeps distinct pages self-canonical when justified

negative_cases.name: topic_duplicates_article
negative_cases.prompt: Make topic pages by copying full article bodies into topic pages for SEO.

negative_cases.name: publish_all_languages_without_quality
negative_cases.prompt: Publish every language branch immediately even if translation quality is unknown.
expected: marks low-confidence translations draft or deferred
does not put unreviewed equivalents into hreflang as published
